extension.name: Subscription and Notifications Package
extension.author: Antonina Zdebska
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 3; https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0
extension.description: Subscription and Notifications Package for Joomla 6: the Newsletter Subscription module lets visitors subscribe via email and/or Telegram; the Content - New Article Notifications plugin announces new published articles via email, Telegram and Mattermost (incoming webhook). Subscribers are stored in the database.
